options.systemMessage:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst specializing in paid advertising messaging strategy.

Your job is to detect meaningful shifts in a competitor's ad messaging week over week.

Focus on: angle changes (feature vs benefit vs social proof vs fear vs urgency), audience targeting shifts (SMB vs enterprise, job titles, verticals), new product or feature names surfacing, value proposition changes, and tone shifts.

If it is the first run and there is no previous week data, analyze only this week's ads and describe the current messaging strategy.

Return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown. No backticks. No code fences. No explanation before or after. If you cannot determine a value, use the string NA.

parameters.content:
# 🚀 Messaging Delta Tracker

## 🔍 How it works

Tracks competitor advertising activity across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn to detect messaging changes and creative shifts over time. The workflow collects ads weekly, extracts and normalizes ad copy, merges multi-platform data, and builds a structured snapshot for competitor messaging comparison.

## ⚙️ How to set up
- [ ] Connect Google Sheets credentials
- [ ]  Configure Adyntel API credentials
- [ ]  Ensure competitor domains are correctly stored in the sheet
- [ ]  - [ ]  Set competitor status to Pending
- [ ]  Enable the weekly schedule trigger
- [ ]  Verify API access for Meta, Google, and LinkedIn ad sources
- [ ]  Test with a small set of competitors

## 🛠️ Customization
- Change execution frequency (daily, weekly, monthly)
-  Add/remove advertising platforms (TikTok, Twitter/X, etc.)
-  Modify extraction logic for ad copy quality improvements
-  Enhance deduplication rules for cleaner datasets
-   Add AI layer for messaging analysis and insights
- Send results to Slack, Notion, Airtable, or dashboards

## 📅 Workflow Trigger & Competitor Processing

Purpose
Starts the workflow on a weekly schedule, fetches competitors marked as Pending from Google Sheets, and processes each competitor one at a time using batch looping.

## 📢 Multi-Platform Ad Collection

Purpose
Collects advertising data from Meta, Google, and LinkedIn using competitor domains, then merges all platform outputs into a single unified dataset for further processing.

## 📊 Messaging Delta Analysis (AI Core)

Purpose
Analyzes week-over-week changes in competitor messaging using AI. Detects new angles, audience shifts, urgency changes, and strategic pivots. Handles edge cases where no ads are found.

## 🗂️ Storage, Alerts & Loop Completion
Purpose
Stores processed ad snapshots and messaging deltas in Google Sheets, triggers Slack alerts for high urgency changes, and ensures continuous loop execution across all competitors.
